name: Read-Only Blocks Projection
decision_reason: SagaScript project-blocks emits visual_blocks_projection_v1.json as metadata-only read-only block projection evidence. Fixture tests cover projectable, partially projectable, advanced opaque, and unsupported C# source; all emitted blocks are non-editable and source files are not mutated. Maintainer verification, editor UI, block editing, source patching implementation, runtime/server behavior changes, package output, distribution output, and SDE work remain absent.
